features: 5-IN-1 CLEAN: Pop one in and let it work its magic. The degreaser, rinse aid and dishwasher salt work together for a shine that looks just-washed, even after a busy Sunday roast.
REMOVES STAINS: Tea rings and tomato splashes do not stand a chance. Use on everyday loads and watch it removes stains from plates, mugs and cutlery without extra scrubbing.
NO-FUSS ROUTINE: Load, place one tablet in the dispenser and hit start. Great for late-night loads when no one wants to measure powders or deal with messy dish washing pods.
VALUE PACK OPTIONS: Choose 18, 46 or 100 dishwasher tabs to match the week ahead. Stock up for big households, or grab a smaller pack for occasional use and travel.
LEMON FRESH FINISH: Open the door to a bright, zesty scent instead of old food smells. Ideal when the kitchen has been cooking all day and the dishwasher needs a refresh.
GREASE GONE FAST: Plates after a fry-up can look scary, but not for long. These dishwasher tablets cut through oily marks so pans and plastic tubs come out clean and fresh.
GLASS SPARKLE: Cloudy glasses can spoil a good set of stemware. The built-in glass protection helps keep tumblers clear, whether it is a quick midweek wash or a party clean-up.
DISHWASHER READY: Designed to suit most machines and cycles. Handy for family homes, shared flats or holiday lets where reliable dishwasher tabs make life simpler.
CLASSIC PERFORMANCE: A trusted formula that just does the job. Perfect for daily washes of lunchboxes, baby bottles and plates, especially when time is tight.
SHINE YOU CAN SEE: Rinse aid action helps water sheet away for fewer spots. Brilliant after entertaining, when every glass and plate needs to look its best at the table.
description: Product Description Elbow Grease Dishwasher Tablets make washing up feel like a small win. Drop one tablet into the machine and let the 5-in-1 action tackle the hard work, so plates, pans and glasses come out looking ready for the cupboard. The formula is made to cut through greasy mess, lift dried-on food and help leave a bright finish, with a lemon fresh scent that makes the kitchen feel cleaner. Each tablet brings together a degreaser, stain removal, rinse aid, dishwasher salt and glass protection. That means fewer water marks, less dullness on glassware and a better clean on everyday loads. From pasta sauce on plates to tea stains on mugs, it helps removes stains without extra steps. It is suitable for all dishwashers and works well on quick cycles or deeper cleans. Choose the pack that fits the household: 18 tablets for smaller kitchens, 46 tablets for the weekly routine, or 100 tablets for busy families who run the machine every day. To use, load the dishwasher, remove any outer wrapping if present, place one tablet in the dispenser or cutlery basket, select the cycle and press start. Ingredients Contains: SODIUM PERCARBONATE; C12-15 PARETH-7; SODIUM DODECYL SULPHATE. Contains amongst other ingredients: 15-30% Oxygen Based Bleaching Agent, 5-15% Non Ionic Surfactants, <5% Anionic Surfactants, Enzymes (Protease, Lipase, Amylase), Parfum. Directions * Load the dishwasher according to the manufacturer's instructions * Remove the protective wrapping from the tablet and place it in the dispenser or in the cutlery basket. 1 tablet is enough whatever the water condition. * Select the required washing cycle and start the dishwasher See more
